title: Rigorous Interval Conditioning for the Finite q-6j Regular Chamber

arithmetic.rounding_model: rigorous midpoint-radius enclosures with outward rounding supplied by Arb

rules: both recoupling schemes have exactly two admissible channels
all finite Racah factorial arguments are nonnegative
the maximum q-number index required by triangle, Racah and dimension factors is 10

frozen_proof_family.anchor: theta0=pi/12 represented as an Arb enclosure
frozen_proof_family.outer_majorant: M_J is an Arb upper enclosure for sup on the outer disk obtained from q-number, q-factorial, triangle, Racah and dimension-factor majorants
frozen_proof_family.success_rule: every carrier lower bound has strictly positive lower endpoint at 192 bits and remains positive at 256 bits

stopping_rule: No change of radius, order, precision, declared class or acceptance rule after confirmatory evaluation. Failure is retained as the module result.
claim_ceiling: A rigorous Arb certificate establishes nonvanishing of the angular-speed function and existence of its holomorphic logarithm on the common disk for the declared finite carrier class.
evidence_rule: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.
